name: Scotch Shortbread 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft.
2. Add powdered sugar, almond extract, and beat until smooth.
3. Mix in all-purpose flour and salt until well combined.
4. Press dough evenly into a greased 11 x 7 x 2-inch pan.
5. Mark the dough with evenly spaced 1-1/2 inch squares using a fork.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool in the pan.
